title: Self-Update and Global Commands

actors.name: Developer
actors.description: CLI user invoking Composer commands for self-management and global package operations

actors.name: getcomposer.org
actors.description: External system: provides version info and phar downloads for self-update

actors.name: OperatingSystem
actors.description: External system: browser launcher (xdg-open/open/start) and filesystem permissions

use_cases.name: Update Composer (self-update)
use_cases.description: Downloads latest (or specified) composer.phar from getcomposer.org, verifies OpenSSL SHA384 signature, backs up current version, replaces local phar
use_cases.preconditions: Running from a phar archive; write access to phar location or cache-dir
steps: Instantiate Versions utility; optionally set channel
Fetch latest version info via Versions::getLatest()
Compare current vs target version; warn on major upgrade skip
Download new phar + signature from getcomposer.org
Verify OpenSSL signature against keys.tags.pub / keys.dev.pub
On Windows permission failure: tryAsWindowsAdmin() via UAC/sudo

use_cases.name: Rollback Composer
use_cases.description: Reverts composer.phar to the most recent backup found in data-dir (*.phar-old.phar)
steps: Locate old phar file in rollbackDir
Call setLocalPhar(localFilename, oldFile) to replace current phar

use_cases.name: Update Public Keys
use_cases.description: Interactively prompt developer to paste new dev/tags public keys; store them in COMPOSER_HOME
steps: Prompt for Dev/Snapshot public key via IO::askAndValidate()
Write keys to config.get('home')/keys.dev.pub and keys.tags.pub

use_cases.name: Select Update Channel
use_cases.description: Persist the preferred update channel in config without performing an update

use_cases.name: Run Global Command
use_cases.description: Proxy wrapper that changes working directory to COMPOSER_HOME and re-runs any Composer command in the global scope
steps: Call prepareSubcommandInput(): clear COMPOSER env var, Factory::createConfig(), chdir(home)
use_cases.notes: isProxyCommand() returns true; supports shell completion for sub-commands

use_cases.name: Install Global Package
use_cases.description: Delegates to RequireCommand in COMPOSER_HOME context to install CLI tools globally

use_cases.name: Remove Global Package
use_cases.description: Delegates to RemoveCommand in COMPOSER_HOME context

use_cases.name: Update Global Packages
use_cases.description: Delegates to UpdateCommand in COMPOSER_HOME context

use_cases.name: Browse Package Homepage / Repository
use_cases.description: Opens or displays a package's repository URL or homepage in the system browser
steps: initializeRepos(): merge RootPackageRepository + local + remote repos
Resolve package list (default: root package name)
For each package: handlePackage(package, showHomepage, showOnly)
handlePackage(): resolve URL from support.source / getSourceUrl() / getHomepage()
If --show (-s): print URL to IO; else call openBrowser(url)
openBrowser(): Platform::isWindows() → start explorer; Linux → xdg-open; macOS → open
options: --homepage / -H: open homepage instead of repository URL
--show / -s: print URL only, do not open browser

use_cases.name: Show Composer Information (about)
use_cases.description: Displays a short description of Composer and links to documentation (simple informational command)

key_relationships: SelfUpdateCommand depends_on Keys (fingerprint for key update)
GlobalCommand depends_on Factory (createConfig for home dir)
include_exclude_relationships: UC5 (Run Global Command) <<includes>> UC6, UC7, UC8 (all global sub-commands)
UC1 (Update Composer) <<extends>> UC3 (Update Keys) via --update-keys option
UC1 (Update Composer) <<extends>> UC4 (Select Channel) via channel flags
important_notes: SelfUpdateCommand only works when running from a phar; exits with error if installed as Composer package or system package
GlobalCommand is a proxy (isProxyCommand=true); does not use execute(), overrides run() directly
GlobalCommand clears COMPOSER env var so project-level composer.json is not picked up
HomeCommand alias is 'home'; primary name is 'browse'
Phar signature verification uses OpenSSL SHA384; keys embedded as fallback if missing from COMPOSER_HOME
Windows self-update uses UAC elevation via VBScript or sudo.exe when write permissions are insufficient
